title: AI Portfolio Design System
description: Live documentation site for @rishi/design-system — tokens, primitives, and AI-specific components used across the five AI portfolio projects.

resumeBullet.text: Extracted and packaged a production-grade design system (tokens, 14 primitives, 5 AI components, Framer Motion variants) consumed by 5 AI apps in a pnpm + turborepo monorepo deployed on Vercel.

portfolioCard.problem: Every app in the portfolio needs a consistent visual identity and accessible interaction patterns without reinventing wheels per app.
portfolioCard.approach: Extracted design tokens from rishikeshgundla.com, built 14 Radix-backed primitives and 5 AI-specific components (streaming narrative, KPI card with sparkline, sortable grid), and Framer Motion variants — published as an internal npm package and deployed as a live showcase.
portfolioCard.impact: Day 1 of each subsequent app ships with a polished, accessible UI. Component code duplication eliminated across 5 apps. Design system alone stands as a resume-worthy artifact.
